commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Codex app-server turn-start path so OpenClaw runtime context is no longer prepended to `turn/start.input` and is instead passed through turn-scoped collaboration instructions, with related tests and prompt snapshots updated.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main clearly prepends the OpenClaw runtime-context marker into `turn/start.input`, and the linked issue comments provide structured live logs showing those decorated `role=user` items replayed in `response.create` and compact inputs.
commands.review_followup: Human maintainer review is needed for the prompt-authority design and existing-session upgrade behavior; this is not a safe automated repair lane from the current PR state.

target.title: Keep Codex runtime context out of user history
target.body:
Fixes #84662.

## Summary

- stop prepending OpenClaw current-turn runtime context to the Codex `turn/start.input` user text
- pass that context through turn-scoped collaboration instructions as quoted reference context, with explicit non-authority wording
- update Codex prompt snapshot generation so MEMORY.md/current-turn context is no longer modeled as ordinary user input

## Real behavior proof

- `turn/start.input[0].text` is now the real user prompt only (`hello` in the focused harness test)
- the OpenClaw runtime context marker remains available in turn-scoped instructions for the active turn
- prompt snapshots now show current-turn reference context under `collaborationMode.settings.developer_instructions`, while the user input section contains only the actual channel prompt

## Validation

- `/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extensions.config.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/thread-lifecycle.test.ts`
- `/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node --import /Users/andy/openclaw/node_modules/tsx/dist/loader.mjs scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check`
- `/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node /Users/andy/openclaw/node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --pretty false --declaration false --singleThreaded --checkers 1`
- `/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node /Users/andy/openclaw/node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 ...changed files...`

If this PR is squash-merged or reworked, please preserve author attribution or include:

`Co-authored-by: Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com>`
